summary: Processor updated to load canonical prompts from Prompts/Blocks/, fallback preserved for blocks without prompt files
notes: Fixed processor to use canonical prompt files from Prompts/Blocks/. Added load_prompt_file() function that extracts short block codes (B01) from full codes (B01_DETAILED_RECAP) for filename mapping. Updated generate_block() to try canonical prompts first with transcript and context injection, fallback to inline BLOCK_DEFINITIONS for blocks without prompt files. B28_STRATEGIC_INTELLIGENCE uses fallback as expected since no Generate_B28.prompt.md exists.
